start.speaker: Eldrin
start.text: The Old Forest is closing its fingers around Krimora scouts. I can guide your road and cover it with arcane arrows, but I do not walk for free.

choices.text: Join me. I can pay 150 gold.
You are already with me, Eldrin.
I need more time to gather coin.

hired.speaker: Eldrin
hired.text: Then we move as one. I will range ahead, thin the line, and drag you out before the forest closes.

already_hired.speaker: Eldrin
already_hired.text: I am already on your line. Point at the threat and I will feather it with arcane fire.

end.speaker: Eldrin
end.text: Come back when your purse is heavier than your doubts.
